title: Force unwrap on double cast in bin() serialization
description: At line 284 in the bin() method, 'value as! Double' is a force cast that will crash at runtime if the value stored for a .double-type field is not actually a Double. Since parameters are typed as [String:Any], any code path that stores a non-Double value for a double-typed field will cause a fatal crash during message serialization.
vulnerable_code: data.append(double: value as! Double, bigEndian: true)
recommendation: Use conditional cast: if let d = value as? Double { data.append(double: d, bigEndian: true) }
